landing.badge: Ƙarshen maginin fayil don masu haɓakawa
landing.subtitle: Duk abin da kuke buƙata don nuna ƙwarewar ku, ayyukanku, da ƙwarewar ku.
landing.featuresSubtitle: Muna ba da duk kayan aikin da kuke buƙata don ficewa daga taron da ƙasa aikin mafarkinku.
landing.feature1Desc: A sauƙaƙe tsara sassan ku, ayyukanku, da ƙwarewarku tare da editan gani na mu mai hankali.
landing.feature2Desc: Zaɓi daga samfuri ƙwararru ko ƙirƙiri naku na musamman kama.
landing.feature3Desc: Bibiyar baƙi, duba ayyukan da suka fi samun kulawa, da ƙari.

deleteAccount.title: Share Account na dindindin
deleteAccount.successMessage: An aika da imel ɗin tabbatar da gogewa.
deleteAccount.errorMessage: An kasa aika imel na tabbatarwa.
deleteAccount.confirmationMessage: Ka tabbata kana son share asusunka na dindindin?
deleteAccount.warningMessage1: Za ku karɓi imel don tabbatar da gogewar asusu.
deleteAccount.warningMessage2: Idan an tabbatar, duk bayanai (fayil, ayyuka, ƙididdiga) za a share su har abada kuma ba za a iya dawo dasu ba.

toasts.toastSessionDisabled: An kashe aiki mai aiki sa ido.

privacy.title: takardar kebantawa
privacy.intro: Wannan Dokar Sirri tana bayanin yadda DevFolio ke tattarawa, amfani da kuma kare keɓaɓɓen bayanin ku lokacin amfani da ayyukanmu.
privacy.section1Content: Muna tattara bayanan da kuke bayarwa kai tsaye lokacin ƙirƙirar asusu, gina fayil, da tuntuɓar tallafin mu.
privacy.section2Content: Ana amfani da bayanin ku don aiki, kulawa, da samar da fasalulluka na ayyukanmu, da kuma sadarwa tare da ku game da asusunku ko ayyukanku.
privacy.section3Content: Muna aiwatar da matakan tsaro masu ma'ana don kare bayananku daga samun izini mara izini, bayyanawa, ko lalata.

confirmDeleteAccount.missingToken: Ba a sami alamar tabbatarwa ba.
confirmDeleteAccount.defaultError: An kasa share asusun. Wataƙila alamar ta ƙare.
confirmDeleteAccount.loadingMessage: Da fatan za a jira, muna sarrafa buƙatarku.
confirmDeleteAccount.successMessage: An share duk bayanan ku na dindindin. Za a tura ku...

forgotPassword.otpSentToEmail: An aika lambar OTP zuwa imel ɗin ku.
forgotPassword.emailThirdParty: An yi rajistar wannan imel ta ɓangare na uku.
forgotPassword.genericError: Akwai kuskure. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
forgotPassword.otpVerified: An yi nasarar tabbatar da lambar OTP.
forgotPassword.otpExpired: Lambar OTP ta ƙare. Da fatan za a nemi sabon lamba.
forgotPassword.otpResent: An aika sabon lambar OTP zuwa imel ɗin ku.
forgotPassword.otpResendFailed: An kasa sake aika lambar OTP. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
forgotPassword.passwordResetSuccess: An yi nasarar sake saita kalmar wucewa. Da fatan za a shiga da sabon kalmar sirrinku.
forgotPassword.passwordResetFailed: An kasa sake saita kalmar wucewa.
forgotPassword.title: Manta kalmar sirri
forgotPassword.description: Shigar da adireshin imel da aka yi rajista akan asusunku. Za mu aika lambar OTP don sake saita kalmar wucewa.
forgotPassword.verifyOtpDesc: Shigar da lambar lambobi 6 da aka aika zuwa imel ɗin ku don tabbatar da ainihin ku.
forgotPassword.newPasswordDesc: Ƙirƙiri sabon kalmar sirri mai ƙarfi don kiyaye asusunku.
forgotPassword.passwordsDoNotMatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba.

verifyEmail.resendError: An kasa sake aika imel ɗin tabbatarwa. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.
verifyEmail.title: Duba Imel ɗinku
verifyEmail.description: Mun aika da imel ɗin tabbatarwa zuwa adireshin imel ɗin ku. Da fatan za a buɗe imel ɗin ku danna maɓallin <1>"Tabbatar da Asusu"</1> don kunna asusun ku.
verifyEmail.step1: Bude aikace-aikacen imel ɗin ku (Gmail, Yahoo, da sauransu)
verifyEmail.step2: Nemo imel daga DevFolio mai taken "Kunna Asusu"
verifyEmail.step3: Danna maballin "Confirm Account" a cikin imel
verifyEmail.step4: Za a tura ku zuwa shafin shiga don shiga
verifyEmail.resendSuccess: An sake aika imel ɗin tabbatarwa!
verifyEmail.footerNote: Ba a karɓi imel ɗin ba? Duba babban fayil ɗin <1>Spam</1> ko <2>Junk</2> a cikin imel ɗin ku. Hanyar tabbatarwa tana aiki na <3>awanni 24</3>.
